subject: Re: ?
body:
please don't make these accussations,, you asked me if she was going to be in palm beach with me, I said no she is flying home commercial ,, 


----- Original Message ----
From: nadia marcinkova <nadja2102@yahoo.com>
To: Jeffrey E Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Wednesday, January 16, 2008 8:04:41 PM
Subject: ?


You just told me Lalasa was not flying to pb with you.. 
You need to stop lying to me.
 


Never miss a thing. Make Yahoo your homepage.
